items.br: Tabela mestre de fornecedores do Oracle Fusion Procurement. Armazena o cadastro principal de todos os fornecedores da organização, incluindo dados de identificação, classificação, status e vínculo com o Trading Community Architecture (TCA). É a tabela central do módulo de Supplier Management, referenciada por praticamente todas as transações de compras e contas a pagar.
items.en: Oracle Fusion Procurement supplier master table. Stores the main registration of all organization suppliers, including identification, classification, status, and Trading Community Architecture (TCA) linkage data. It is the central table of the Supplier Management module, referenced by virtually all purchasing and accounts payable transactions.
items.es: Oracle Fusion Procurement supplier master table. Stores the main registration of all organization suppliers, including identification, classification, status, and Trading Community Architecture (TCA) linkage data. It is the central table of the Supplier Management module, referenced by virtually all purchasing and accounts payable transactions.

items.br: Esta tabela é utilizada nos seguintes processos:
items.en: This table is used in the following processes:
items.es: Esta tabla se utiliza en los siguientes procesos:

items.br: Registro centralizado de todos os fornecedores (nacionais e internacionais).
items.en: Centralized registration of all suppliers (domestic and international).
items.es: Centralized registration of all suppliers (domestic and international).

items.br: Referência obrigatória em todos os POs — identifica o fornecedor da transação.
items.en: Mandatory reference in all POs — identifies the transaction supplier.
items.es: Mandatory reference in all POs — identifies the transaction supplier.

items.br: Vínculo com faturas (AP Invoices) para processamento de pagamentos.
items.en: Link with invoices (AP Invoices) for payment processing.
items.es: Link with invoices (AP Invoices) for payment processing.

items.br: Base para processos de qualificação, homologação e avaliação de fornecedores.
items.en: Basis for supplier qualification, approval, and evaluation processes.
items.es: Basis for supplier qualification, approval, and evaluation processes.

items.br: Identificação de fornecedores elegíveis para negociações e cotações.
items.en: Identification of eligible suppliers for negotiations and quotations.
items.es: Identification of eligible suppliers for negotiations and quotations.

items.br: Dimensão principal em análises de gastos (Spend Analysis).
Ponte entre o cadastro de procurement e o Trading Community Architecture (HZ_PARTIES).
items.en: Bridge between procurement registration and Trading Community Architecture (HZ_PARTIES).
items.es: Bridge between procurement registration and Trading Community Architecture (HZ_PARTIES).

items.br: Escala de 0% a 100% — grau de certeza da descrição gerada por IA com base na documentação oficial Oracle (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).
items.en: Scale from 0% to 100% — degree of certainty of the AI-generated description based on official Oracle documentation (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).
items.es: Escala de 0% a 100% — grado de certeza de la descripcion generada por IA basada en la documentacion oficial Oracle (OEDMF/BICC Release 13/25A).

items.br: - 🟢 81–100% — Coluna presente na documentação oficial Oracle; nome, tipo e descrição confirmados.
items.en: - 🟢 81–100% — Column present in official Oracle documentation; name, type and description confirmed.
items.es: - 🟢 81–100% — Columna presente en la documentacion oficial Oracle; nombre, tipo y descripcion confirmados.

items.br: - 🟡 51–80% — Coluna inferida por naming convention ou padrão Oracle; tipo exato pode variar.
items.en: - 🟡 51–80% — Column inferred by naming convention or Oracle standard; exact type may vary.
items.es: - 🟡 51–80% — Columna inferida por naming convention o estandar Oracle; tipo exacto puede variar.

items.br: - 🔴 0–50% — Existência ou tipo incertos; pode não existir no release atual; validar no ambiente.
items.en: - 🔴 0–50% — Uncertain existence or type; may not exist in current release; validate in environment.
items.es: - 🔴 0–50% — Existencia o tipo inciertos; puede no existir en el release actual; validar en el ambiente.

items.br: Número do fornecedor (código visível ao usuário)
Tipo do fornecedor: VENDOR, EMPLOYEE, TAX_AUTHORITY, etc.
items.en: Supplier type: VENDOR, EMPLOYEE, TAX_AUTHORITY, etc.
items.es: Supplier type: VENDOR, EMPLOYEE, TAX_AUTHORITY, etc.

Sujeito a reporte federal (Y/N) — contexto US

items.es: Subject to federal reporting (Y/N) — US context

items.br: ap_invoices_all — Faturas de contas a pagar
poz_site_assignments_all_m — Atribuições de sites a BUs
Buscar fornecedor por número ou nome
items.en: Search supplier by number or name
items.es: Search supplier by number or name

items.br: Esta é a tabela mais referenciada do módulo Procurement — alterações no VENDOR_ID impactam praticamente todo o ecossistema de compras e pagamentos.
items.en: This is the most referenced table in the Procurement module — changes to VENDOR_ID impact virtually the entire purchasing and payments ecosystem.
items.es: This is the most referenced table in the Procurement module — changes to VENDOR_ID impact virtually the entire purchasing and payments ecosystem.

items.br: O PARTY_ID vincula o fornecedor ao TCA (Trading Community Architecture), onde ficam dados como CNPJ/CPF, endereço fiscal e informações de partido.
items.en: The PARTY_ID links the supplier to TCA (Trading Community Architecture), where data such as CNPJ/CPF, fiscal address, and party information reside.
items.es: The PARTY_ID links the supplier to TCA (Trading Community Architecture), where data such as CNPJ/CPF, fiscal address, and party information reside.

items.br: O campo BUSINESS_RELATIONSHIP controla se o fornecedor está autorizado para gastos (SPEND_AUTHORIZED) ou apenas registrado.
items.en: The BUSINESS_RELATIONSHIP field controls whether the supplier is authorized for spending (SPEND_AUTHORIZED) or only registered.
items.es: The BUSINESS_RELATIONSHIP field controls whether the supplier is authorized for spending (SPEND_AUTHORIZED) or only registered.

items.br: Dados sensíveis como CPF/CNPJ do representante legal ficam na tabela separada POZ_SUPPLIERS_PII.
items.en: Sensitive data such as the legal representative CPF/CNPJ is stored in the separate POZ_SUPPLIERS_PII table.
items.es: Sensitive data such as the legal representative CPF/CNPJ is stored in the separate POZ_SUPPLIERS_PII table.

items.br: O SEGMENT1 é o número do fornecedor visível ao usuário; pode ser sequencial ou seguir regra de numeração customizada.
items.en: SEGMENT1 is the user-visible supplier number; it can be sequential or follow a custom numbering rule.
items.es: SEGMENT1 is the user-visible supplier number; it can be sequential or follow a custom numbering rule.

items.br: Fornecedores com ONE_TIME_FLAG = 'Y' são tipicamente usados para pagamentos pontuais e não participam de processos de sourcing.
items.en: Suppliers with ONE_TIME_FLAG = 'Y' are typically used for one-time payments and do not participate in sourcing processes.
items.es: Suppliers with ONE_TIME_FLAG = 'Y' are typically used for one-time payments and do not participate in sourcing processes.
